source: GitHub app repository inventory, current deep-interview spec, local verification evidence, and cited 2026 market notes.
guardrails: No secrets, payment, private credential, or OTP entry.
No private-to-public conversion without explicit confirmation.
No destructive deletion or unarchive/visibility changes without explicit action-time confirmation.
